landing.heroSubtitle: Register students, track attendance, publish grades, and keep families informed — without spreadsheets or scattered tools.
landing.heroPoint1: Guided school setup in a few steps
landing.heroPoint2: Works in the browser — no installation
landing.heroPoint3: Ivorian, French, and English school systems
landing.featuresDesc: The basics most schools need first: people, classes, grades, schedules, and family access.
landing.feature1Desc: Create your school step by step: identity, location, contacts, and admin account.
landing.feature2Desc: Manage headcount, classes, and profiles from a structured dashboard.
landing.feature3Desc: Enter assessments and view report cards for each student or class.
landing.feature4Desc: Organize courses, rooms, and time slots in one place.
landing.feature5Desc: View routes and stops for school pickup.
landing.feature6Desc: Parents, students, and teachers access their information securely.
landing.stepsTitle: From registration to dashboard in minutes
landing.stepsDesc: A linear flow without endless forms — with Back and Continue at each step.
landing.step1Desc: Enter the name, type, and school system in a few minutes.
landing.step2Desc: Add the address and place the school on the map.
landing.step3Desc: Phone, official email, and school leader.
landing.step4Desc: Sign in and start managing classes, grades, and services.
landing.modulesDesc: Start with classes and grades. Turn on payments, cafeteria, or transport when your school is ready.
landing.faqDesc: What you need to know before setting up your school on NewGee.
landing.faq1A: NewGee is an online school management platform: school registration, classes, grades, schedules, attendance, payments, cafeteria, and transport — all from one dashboard.
landing.faq2Q: How do I register my school?
landing.faq2A: Click "Create a school", follow the guided flow in just a few steps (identity, location, contacts, admin account), then sign in with the email and password you chose.
landing.faq3A: Primary, middle school (Collège), and high school (Lycée), with Ivorian, French, or English systems. The dashboard adapts automatically to your type and system (class levels, labels, etc.).
landing.faq4Q: Who can sign in to the platform?
landing.faq4A: Each account has a role set by the school: admin, teacher, parent, or student. Sign-in uses the account email and password — no manual role selection.
landing.faq5Q: Do I need to install software?
landing.faq5A: No. NewGee runs in the browser (computer, tablet, or phone). No local installation is required — the app and data are hosted online.
landing.faq6A: Accounts are authenticated with a password and secure token. Access is limited by each user's role. Your school information stays private to your institution.
landing.ctaBandTitle: Set up your school on NewGee
landing.ctaBandSubtitle: Create your admin account, enter your school details, and start managing classes online.
landing.plansTitle: Choose a plan that fits your size
landing.plansDesc: Transparent monthly pricing based on student count. All plans include secure hosting and regular updates.
landing.footerTagline: School management for teams on the ground.
landing.footerSocialHint: Follow us on our professional pages (links to be configured).
landing.footerCguBloc: Full terms will be published here. Questions: contact@newgeeacademy.com
landing.footerLegalBloc: Publisher information: contact contact@newgeeacademy.com for details.
landing.footerSecondary: Built for Francophone schools in Africa and beyond

plans.pageDesc: Compare what is included in each offer. Prices are per school, billed monthly. You can change plans as your enrollment grows.
plans.compareDesc: A side-by-side view of what each plan includes.
plans.billingNote: Prices shown in West African CFA francs (FCFA). Annual billing available on request. Module access may be adjusted during the trial period.
plans.row_students_excluded: Student limit reached on lower tier

classGroups.title: Class groups
classGroups.subtitle: Create groups like 5ème A, 5ème B with a fixed number of students. Then assign them to courses.
classGroups.empty: No class groups yet. Create one to assign to courses.
classGroups.createDesc: Set the group name (e.g. 5ème A) and the number of students. You will assign this group to a course when creating the course.

courses.noStudentsInSystem: No students in the system. Create students first: Faculty → Create → Role: Student.
